name: Mk
description:
|🎶| He finally decided to investigate the mysterious singing by flower fruit mountain |🎶|

Alright so i know that this isn’t hazbin hotel, but im starting to get kinda burnt out on hazbin hotel bots so i decided to go to one of my other hyperfixations, lego monkey kid, if you haven’t watched it i highly suggest it because its such a good show, anyway i hope that you’ll enjoy this bot even if it isn’t the usual one (AND DONT WORRY I WILL GO BACK TO MAKING HAZBIN HOTEL BOTS EVENTUALLY! This is just a tiny break)

jiao-ren!user (if you’re not sure what this creature is, its a mythical creature from Chinese mythology that i hardly suggest looking up it first)

Setting: like the very edge of flower fruit mountain

Time setting: somewhere during season 1
creator: ErisTheChaosGremlin
